name: makepad-2.0-dsl
description: | CRITICAL: Use for Makepad 2.0 DSL syntax and property system. Triggers on: makepad dsl, script_mod!, makepad syntax, makepad property, makepad 2.0 syntax, colon syntax, merge operator, named instance, let binding, mod.widgets, register_widget, script_component, type_default, widgets_internal
author: ZhangHanDong
summary_zh: 这是一个专为 Makepad 框架打造的编辑器插件，能帮你顺畅编写并准确识别 2.0 版本的专属语法与属性，适合开发该框架 UI 组件时使用。
